leadText: Yogurt (Japanese: ヨーグルト Yogurt) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment that's very sweet and very sour. It goes especially well with fruit and is easy to incorporate into a sandwich.
